EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITinEdit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN editing.

[Guid("6615635A-BFAB-11D2-9F6D-00C04F8ECE27")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinEdit

Properties

IsDirty

Indicates if the TIN is dirty.

bool IsDirty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEditable

Indicates if the TIN can be edited.

bool IsEditable { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsInEditMode

Indicates if the TIN is in edit mode.

bool IsInEditMode { get; }

Property Value

bool

Adds pixels from a pixel block to the TIN.
